mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shares (share_uuid, space_id, creator_user_id, share_type, title, access_code_hash, allow_preview, allow_download, max_access_count, current_access_count, expired_at, status, revoked_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shareUuid}, #{spaceId}, #{creatorUserId}, #{shareType}, #{title}, #{accessCodeHash}, #{allowPreview}, #{allowDownload}, #{maxAccessCount}, #{currentAccessCount}, #{expiredAt}, #{status}, #{revokedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, share_uuid, space_id, creator_user_id, share_type, title, access_code_hash, allow_preview, allow_download, max_access_count, current_access_count, expired_at, status, revoked_at, created_at, updated_at FROM shares WHERE share_uuid = #{shareUuid} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE shares SET status = 'revoked', revoked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE share_uuid = #{shareUuid} AND creator_user_id = #{creatorUserId} AND status = 'active'

UPDATE shares SET current_access_count = current_access_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'active' AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > NOW()) AND (max_access_count IS NULL OR current_access_count < max_access_count)
